description: Each operation assigned to exactly one eligible machine
No two operations on the same machine overlap in time (AddNoOverlap)
Operation precedence within a job (op N+1 starts after op N ends)
Operation duration matches the machine's duration for that op
Operation must fit within a machine's daily operating hours
Machine maintenance windows are blocked
Machine unavailable days are blocked
Sequence-dependent setup time between different op_types on same machine
An operator is required on the machine during the operation
Operator skill must match the machine type
Operator daily max minutes not exceeded
Operator unavailable days respected
Tool availability: simultaneous usage cannot exceed tool quantity
Job due day: all operations of a job finish by end of due_day
Earliest start day: no operation may start before job's earliest_start_day
Precedence across days: op N+1 day >= op N day
No operator runs two machines simultaneously
Machine type compatibility (op_type must match machine type)
Urgent jobs complete within first 2 days
At most 1 setup (op_type) change per machine per day
Minimise makespan (total completion time)
Minimise total tardiness (late jobs vs due date)
Balance machine utilisation across the 15 machines
Minimise total setup-time overhead
Balance operator workload
Prioritise high-priority jobs (earliness bonus)
